title: (Bearish Signal) ITCI, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned negative
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bearish indicator signaling ITCI's price could decline from here. Traders may explore shorting the stock or put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 46 similar cases where ITCI's MACD histogram became negative, and 39 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 85%. Current price $37.68 is above $32.61 the highest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 01/21/21 - 02/23/21, the price experienced a +13% Uptrend, while the week of 02/16/21 - 02/23/21 shows a -5% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/wdtuds8jvgj61.png?width=1534&format=png&auto=webp&s=6e667ae35ce826aa6fe43b46e5c26b9943a15bc2

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator may be shifting from an upward trend to a downward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 51 of 56 cases where ITCI's Stochastic Oscillator exited the overbought zone, the price fell further within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 90%.

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on February 23, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on ITCI as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 67 of 82 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 82%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram (MACD) for ITCI turned negative on February 23, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to turn lower in the coming weeks. Traders may want to sell the stock or buy put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 46 similar instances when the indicator turned negative. In 39 of the 46 cases the stock turned lower in the days that followed. This puts the odds of success at 85%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where ITCI declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 84%.

ITCI broke above its upper Bollinger Band on February 05, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9494121-intra-cellular-therapies-s-itci-36-89-moving-average-convergence-divergence-macd-histogram-just-turned-negative?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=blog)
